global.description: The ad features a bold orange background with prominent text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback with a simple signup.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text that reads 'Earn cashback daily', prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that states 'Fast signup, instant card'.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: An abstract design featuring a circle and a square in a lighter shade of orange.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom that says 'Shop now'.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'EarnPath' displayed in a small size at the top left corner.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small text element that appears to be a brand name or title.
